message:
refactor(host): parallelize connector self-checks in doctor diagnostics

Replace sequential self-check loop with concurrent execution via
futures::future::join_all. Each connector check now runs in its own
async task with Arc-cloned registry, allowing multiple connectors to
be health-checked simultaneously. Preserves all error handling paths
(timeout, cancelled, runtime failure, not-found).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
